missing_value_cleaning_decisions: Converted all fetched series values to numeric with non-numeric values coerced to NA.
Resampled each source to month-start frequency before combining series.
Merged supplementary datasets using an outer join on Month.
Filled internal missing values in core series using time interpolation.
Dropped months with remaining missing values in core series after interpolation.
Retained structural missing values in lag/diff features.
